name: How do I file a workers comp claim for breathing problems from work fumes?

mainEntity.name: How do I file a workers comp claim for breathing problems from work fumes?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify employer in writing ASAP, file with state board. Gather medical proof of work link[2][5].
acceptedAnswer.description: Notify your employer in writing within 30 days of diagnosis or awareness, then file a formal claim with your state's workers' comp board—online or by form. The process covers medical treatment, temporary disability, and permanent impairment for respiratory illnesses proven work-related[2][5]. Employers must respond, and disputes go to hearings. - Gather medical records, witness statements, and exposure logs. - Request OSHA violation checks for poor ventilation. - Deadlines vary: Utah often 1 year from disability. Submit promptly, attend all appointments, and get legal help if denied to navigate appeals effectively.

description: Notify employer in writing ASAP, file with state board. Gather medical proof of work link[2][5].
